_comment: Copy this file to .mcp.json and replace ABSOLUTE_PATH_TO_REPO and PACKAGE_HASH. PACKAGE_HASH appears after Unity resolves the mcp-unity package (run Unity once on the project). Find the actual directory under UnityProject/Library/PackageCache/com.gamelovers.mcp-unity@<HASH>/. Then restart Claude Code so it picks up the servers. The hzdb entry is portable via npx and needs no local edits; run `npx -y @meta-quest/hzdb mcp install project` to add it automatically.
